memo_changes.old: Greet, confirm emergency, transfer to on-call electrician, fallback if transfer fails.
memo_changes.new: Greet, confirm emergency (5 triggers), collect name/number, transfer to on-call 512-555-0183 then 512-555-0247 (30s each), if fail direct to 911 for life-safety risk or give 15-min callback. Spanish language callers supported.

memo_changes.old: I'm connecting you with our on-call electrician now.
memo_changes.new: I'm connecting you with our on-call electrician now. Please hold.

memo_changes.old: I was unable to reach our on-call team. A technician will call you back.
memo_changes.new: I was unable to reach our on-call team. If this is a life-safety emergency, please call 911 immediately. Otherwise, a technician will call you back within fifteen minutes.

old: total power outage at commercial property
new: total power outage at commercial property
electrical fire smell or visible smoke near electrical equipment

old: do not create Jobber jobs automatically without human review
new: do not create Jobber jobs automatically – human review required
never reveal on-call technician names to callers – say 'our on-call technician'
never provide price estimates or quotes on calls – redirect to business hours

memo_changes.old: Demo call. On-call rotation numbers not yet provided. Spanish language mentioned as possible need.
memo_changes.new: Spanish language support confirmed. On-call names never disclosed to callers.

memo_changes.old: Greet, collect purpose, route appropriately, take message for non-urgent.
memo_changes.new: Greet, collect purpose, collect name and number, route or message. No quotes. No on-call names disclosed.

old: What are the on-call electrician phone numbers?

spec_changes.old: I'm connecting you with our on-call electrician now.
spec_changes.new: I'm connecting you with our on-call electrician now. Please hold.

spec_changes.old: I was unable to reach our on-call team. A technician will call you back.
spec_changes.new: I was unable to reach our on-call team. If this is a life-safety emergency, please call 911 immediately. Otherwise, a technician will call you back within fifteen minutes.

old: do not create Jobber jobs automatically without human review
new: do not create Jobber jobs automatically – human review required
never reveal on-call technician names to callers – say 'our on-call technician'
never provide price estimates or quotes on calls – redirect to business hours
